title: cenchrus yemensis
intro: Cenchrus yemensis, also known as the Yemen grass or sandbur, is a plant species that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been shown to aid in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of Cenchrus yemensis include reducing fever, treating gastrointestinal issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Cenchrus yemensis are often made into decoctions or infusions, which can be consumed as a tea or used topically to apply its medicinal properties.
